cross_scene_arcs.title: Ransom Plot Execution
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Carl agrees to kidnap Jean Lundegaard for ransom, pursues her, demands money from Jerry, acquires it after shooting Wade, hides and splits the cash with Grimsrud.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Agreed to kidnap Jean for upfront payment of a car and $40,000.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Money split with Grimsrud, partnership ended, Carl planning to take the Sierra.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Carl's death prevents him from enjoying the stolen money.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Deteriorating Alliance with Grimsrud
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Carl partners with Grimsrud for the kidnapping, but tensions emerge as Carl asserts control and later ends the partnership, culminating in Grimsrud killing him during a dispute over a car.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Criminal partners in the kidnapping scheme.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Partnership ends violently with Carl killed by Grimsrud's ax.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Escalating Violence and Injury
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Carl is involved in violent incidents, from witnessing a trooper's murder to being beaten by Shep Proudfoot, shot in the jaw by Wade, and finally killed by Grimsrud.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Accessory to murder after trooper's death.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Dead from an ax wound inflicted by Grimsrud.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Financial Schemes to Criminal Plot
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jerry's attempts to secure money through dishonest car sales and loan requests fail, leading him to initiate a kidnapping plot for ransom.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jerry as a car salesman facing customer accusations over TruCoat charges
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jerry finalizes kidnapping arrangements with Carl and Gaear
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether the kidnapping will provide the needed funds

cross_scene_arcs.title: Managing the Kidnapping Fallout
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jerry discovers his home disturbed, takes charge of the kidnapping response, faces escalating ransom demands and financial threats, and conceals Wade's body.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jerry finds signs of disturbance at home and attempts to contact Wade
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jerry hides Wade's body in a Cadillac trunk after covering up evidence
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How to deliver the ransom and avoid further consequences from kidnappers and creditors

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Questioning to Arrest
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jerry lies to police about stolen vehicles, flees when questioned further, and is captured while attempting to escape from a motel.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jerry under police scrutiny for vehicle thefts, denying involvement
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jerry in police custody, sobbing after being dragged from a bathroom window

cross_scene_arcs.title: Investigation Lead Development
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Marge examines the triple homicide scene, deduces two perpetrators, refines vehicle identification to dealer plates, receives a motel lead, and gathers witness statements about suspects heading to Twin Cities.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Investigating a triple homicide with minimal evidence.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Has developed specific leads on suspects' vehicle, appearance, and destination.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Suspects remain unidentified and at large.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confrontation with Suspects
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Marge interrogates Shep Proudfoot about a phone call, questions Jerry Lundegaard about vehicle theft, and when Jerry becomes defensive and flees, she calls for backup.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Following up on investigative leads involving Shep and Jerry.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jerry flees, indicating potential guilt and escalating the investigation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Jerry's whereabouts and the extent of his involvement.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Mike Yanagita's Deception
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Marge meets Mike Yanagita, who emotionally discloses his wife's death, but later learns from a phone call that his story is false and he has psychiatric problems.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Reconnecting with an old acquaintance who shares a personal tragedy.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Discovers Mike's deception, understanding his unreliability.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How Mike's false story affects the investigation's direction.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Apprehension of Grimsrud
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Marge approaches the cabin, finds Grimsrud dismembering a body, orders him to stop, shoots him when he flees, arrests him, and transports him while reflecting on the case.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Actively pursuing suspects to their hideout.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: One suspect apprehended and in custody, case nearing closure.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Pregnancy and Personal Life
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Throughout the investigation, Marge experiences pregnancy-related morning sickness, and after the arrest, returns home to her husband Norm.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Pregnant and managing personal life alongside professional duties.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Pregnant, with the case resolved, back in her home environment.
